HIGH.sw: AfyaAI: DHARURA! Nenda {facility} SASA. Au piga 112. Rejea: {code}. Onyesha nambari hii kwa daktari.
HIGH.en: AfyaAI: EMERGENCY! Go to {facility} NOW. Or call 112. Ref: {code}. Show this to doctor.

MEDIUM.sw: AfyaAI: Tafadhali tembelea {facility}. Rejea: {code}. Leo au kesho. Maswali? Piga 0800-AFYA.
MEDIUM.en: AfyaAI: Please visit {facility}. Ref: {code}. Today or tomorrow. Questions? Call 0800-AFYA.

LOW.sw: AfyaAI: Pumzika na kunywa maji. Tembelea kituo kama dalili haziendi. Rejea: {code}. Maswali? 0800-AFYA.
LOW.en: AfyaAI: Rest and hydrate. Visit facility if symptoms persist. Ref: {code}. Questions? 0800-AFYA.

appointment_reminder.sw: AfyaAI: Una miadi tarehe {date} saa {time} kwenye {facility}. Tafadhali fika mapema. Rejea: {code}.
appointment_reminder.en: AfyaAI: You have an appointment on {date} at {time} at {facility}. Please arrive early. Ref: {code}.

appointment_confirmation.sw: AfyaAI: Miadi yako imethimitishwa. Tarehe: {date}, Saa: {time}, Kituo: {facility}. Rejea: {code}.
appointment_confirmation.en: AfyaAI: Your appointment is confirmed. Date: {date}, Time: {time}, Facility: {facility}. Ref: {code}.

missed_appointment.sw: AfyaAI: Hujaonekana kwenye miadi yako ya {date}. Tafadhali wasiliana na {facility} ili kupanga upya.
missed_appointment.en: AfyaAI: You missed your appointment on {date}. Please contact {facility} to reschedule.

medication_reminder.sw: AfyaAI: Kumbusho la dawa: Meza {medication} sasa. Fuata maelekezo ya daktari. Maswali? 0800-AFYA.
medication_reminder.en: AfyaAI: Medication reminder: Take {medication} now. Follow doctor's instructions. Questions? 0800-AFYA.

test_results_ready.sw: AfyaAI: Matokeo yako ya vipimo yameandaliwa. Tembelea {facility} ili kupokea. Rejea: {code}.
test_results_ready.en: AfyaAI: Your test results are ready. Visit {facility} to collect. Ref: {code}.

chw_outreach.sw: AfyaAI: CHW {chw_name} atakuja kutembelea kaya yako tarehe {date}. Hatari: {risk_level}.
chw_outreach.en: AfyaAI: CHW {chw_name} will visit your household on {date}. Risk level: {risk_level}.

chw_referral_alert.sw: AfyaAI CHW: Tafadhali tembelea kaya ya {household_name}. Hatari: {risk_level}. Rejea: {code}.
chw_referral_alert.en: AfyaAI CHW: Please visit household {household_name}. Risk: {risk_level}. Ref: {code}.

facility_queue_update.sw: AfyaAI: Wewe ni wa {position} kwenye foleni. Muda wa kusubiri: ~{wait_time} dakika. Kituo: {facility}.
facility_queue_update.en: AfyaAI: You are #{position} in queue. Wait time: ~{wait_time} minutes. Facility: {facility}.

prescription_refill.sw: AfyaAI: Dawa yako {medication} inaisha. Tafadhali tembelea {facility} kwa kujaza upya. Rejea: {code}.
prescription_refill.en: AfyaAI: Your {medication} is running low. Please visit {facility} for refill. Ref: {code}.

pregnancy_milestone.sw: AfyaAI: Hongera! Umefikia wiki ya {week} ya ujauzito. Miadi yako inayofuata: {next_appointment}. Chanjo: {immunization}.
pregnancy_milestone.en: AfyaAI: Congratulations! You're at week {week} of pregnancy. Next appointment: {next_appointment}. Vaccine: {immunization}.

child_immunization.sw: AfyaAI: Chanjo ya {vaccine_name} kwa {child_name} tarehe {due_date}. Tembelea {facility}. Rejea: {code}.
child_immunization.en: AfyaAI: {vaccine_name} vaccine for {child_name} due on {due_date}. Visit {facility}. Ref: {code}.

emergency_broadcast.sw: AfyaAI: [TANGAZO LA DHARURA] {message}. Kwa maelezo zaidi piga 0800-AFYA.
emergency_broadcast.en: AfyaAI: [EMERGENCY ALERT] {message}. For more info call 0800-AFYA.

health_education.sw: AfyaAI: Kidokezo cha Afya: {tip}. Taarifa zaidi: www.afyaai.go.tz
health_education.en: AfyaAI: Health Tip: {tip}. More info: www.afyaai.go.tz

feedback_request.sw: AfyaAI: Je, huduma yetu ilikusaidia? Jibu 1=Ndiyo, 2=Hapana, 3=Kidogo. Asante!
feedback_request.en: AfyaAI: Did our service help you? Reply 1=Yes, 2=No, 3=Somewhat. Thank you!

safety_disclaimer.sw: AfyaAI haibadilishi daktari. Daima fuata ushauri wa mhudumu wa afya.
safety_disclaimer.en: AfyaAI does not replace a doctor. Always follow healthcare advice.

opt_out.sw: Umetoka kwenye huduma za AfyaAI. Tuma START ili kurudi. Maswali? 0800-AFYA.
opt_out.en: You've unsubscribed from AfyaAI. Reply START to rejoin. Questions? 0800-AFYA.

welcome.sw: Karibu AfyaAI! Huduma yako ya afya kwa simu. Tuma AFYA kwa maswali. Msaada: 0800-AFYA.
welcome.en: Welcome to AfyaAI! Your mobile health service. Send AFYA for questions. Help: 0800-AFYA.
